title: Red Forest
description: A brand new Minecraft adventure with a new biome, dimension, structures, mobs and so much more!
body:
# Red Forest Mod
A brand new Minecraft adventure! Explore a brand new biome, the Red Forest as well as a new dimension. 

## Features
- Story Mode with quests and rewards
- Red Forest Biome & Dimension
- Normal and Reinforced Amethyst Armor
- A lot of new Structures and Mobs
- TNT editing
- 10+ new weapons

*and so much more...*

## How to get
Get it from the downloads section in Modrinth.

## Have more Questions?

Join our [subreddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/redforestmc/).
Discord server: *Coming soon*

## Credits
We thank: 

- @Vegacraft for making youtube video. You can find his channel [here](https://youtube.com/@VegaCraftTutorials?si=MFXjzCXx8jHIHmwP).
- @WilloMC: structure
"Steampunk hammer" by @RayZens
- @joseszura: Glock, M4A1, FAL, AK-47, Sniper  
- @NightFox666089: bomb c4
- @snakeblock30: Old Powerful Gun 
- @Gengar: Throwing Knife, Shotgun 
- @GalaxyLinus & b3nja015 by GalaxyLinus: Leviathan Axe 
- @Emilie: Nether Stick 
- @02h30: M82 
- @Asc4Yin: RPG 
- @LordVoltz: Wizard Staff
- @Caledhril: Metal spring

All of the above have been taken from open websites that allow the use of models in mods and other projects, if the creators are rightfully credited for their work. 

If you see the use of your structure or model please let us know so that we can include it in the credits or take it down.
